description_long: This object is a modern, compact shotgun with a robust, tactical design. The barrel is relatively short and features multiple venting slots along the top and sides, likely for heat dissipation and reduced weight. The cylinder and frame are integrated into a single, solid body, with a visible trigger and a large, rounded trigger guard. The grip is ergonomically shaped, black in color, and appears to be made of a textured material for improved handling. Accents of light green are visible along the barrel vents, adding a distinctive visual element. The overall finish is matte black with some metallic highlights, giving it a sleek, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a vented barrel, ergonomic black grip, and matte black finish accented by light green highlights. The design is modern and robust, with a large trigger guard and integrated frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the vented top of the shotgun.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the vented barrel, the cylinder, and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel and frame.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the vented barrel, cylinder, and grip, mirroring the left side but from the opposite angle.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with multiple venting slots along the top and sides; short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves
